== Notes for [[Item:Q112483|Q112483]] ==

Toda Galíndez de Aragón1

b. before 890

Father Galindo II Aznárez, conde de Aragón1 b. circa 870, d. between 920 and 922

Mother Acibella Garcés de Gascuña1

Toda Galíndez de Aragón was born before 890. She married Bernard I, conde de Ribagorza y Pallars, son of Ramón I, conde Ribagorza y Pallars and Guinigenta Aznárez, in 890.1,2 Toda Galíndez de Aragón was the daughter of Galindo II Aznárez, conde de Aragón and Acibella Garcés de Gascuña.1

Family

Bernard I, conde de Ribagorza y Pallars b. circa 885, d. after 950

Child

Ramón II, conde Ribagorza y Pallars+ b. c 925, d. c 9701

Citations

[S204] Roderick W. Stuart, RfC, 290-37.

[S204] Roderick W. Stuart, RfC, 286-37.
----------------------------------------------------
http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/ARAGON%20&%20CATALONIA.htm#_Toc203441649:

TOTA Galindónez (-after Apr 941). The Codex de Roda names "domna Tota…domnus Redemtus episcopus et domno Miro" as the children of "GalindoAsnari" and his first wife Acibella, stating that Toda married "Uernardi comitis"[44]. The end 13th century “Crònica d´Alaó Renovada” names “Totam filiam Galindonis comitis Aragonensis” as wife of “Bernardus comes Ripacurcie”, adding that they built the monastery of Ovarra where they were both buried[45]. m BERNARDO [I] Conde de Ribagorza, son of RAIMUNDO [I] Conde de Ribagorza & his wife --- (-[Mar 950/Nov 956], bur Ovarra).

Name Suffix:<NSFX> Of Aragon

Name Suffix:<NSFX> Of Aragon

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
